title: Building But Better
description: A mod expanding upon building shapes and flexibility
body: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1378839788659933345?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/maQ6tE6Nsd) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/989479?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=CurseForge&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/building-but-better) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/building-but-better?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=00af5c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/building-but-better) [![Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.20.1-6b6b88?style=flat-square&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/building-but-better/files) ### ⚠️ NOTICE : This is currently undergoing a total rewrite for 1.21.1 - I am redoing all of the blocks, features, code, and art from the ground-up. Please have patience with me during this time \:-) --- ### 📋 About **Building But Better** is a mod inspired by other mods such as Conquest, Cocricot, and Miniaturia with the aspiration of acting as a staple for Vanilla builders by expanding upon Minecraft’s shapes and adding customizability via block interactions. --- ### 🔧 Information ✅ Supported  ▪  ⚠️ Maintenance  ▪  ❌ Deprecated | Feature | Details | |---|---| | **Mod Loaders** | Fabric Forge | | **MC Versions** | ⚠️1.20.1 |
